CONTENT.Career: In January 2024, Loizou joined Dutch Eredivisie club Heerenveen on loan for the remainder of the season.
CONTENT.Honours: OmoniaCypriot First Division: 2020–21Cypriot Cup: 2021–22, 2022–23Cypriot Super Cup: 2021IndividualCypriot First Division Young Player of the Year: 2020–21Cypriot First Division Team of the Year: 2020–21

SUMMARY: Loizos Loizou (Greek: Λοΐζος Λοΐζου; born 18 July 2003) is a Cypriot professional footballer who plays as a winger for Omonia Nicosia.
